examples: "Don't you think you're being slightly melodramatic?" Jane asked.
It is the melodious drama of ancient Greek theater, the term "melodious drama" being shortened eventually to "melodrama" because operas frequently are melodramatic, not to say unrealistic.
The ending may be a bit melodramatic, but the movie is guerrilla filmmaking at its best.
On film it became a melodramatic pad around Victorian London, gamely carried by a pre-"Pirates" Johnny Depp.
